aboutRight.aboutText: Creative developer with a background in audiovisual communication, which means I don't just build websites — I build stories. I bridge the gap between technical architecture and visual aesthetics, using React and Full-Stack tools to create high-performance experiences that actually feel like something.

archivement.text: Hello there! My name is Dēivid Sans. I am a web designer & developer, and Im very passionate and dedicated to my work.
With 10+ years experience as a professional designer, I have acquired the skills to make your project a success.

aboutRight.note: “Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Faucibus sed sit ultrices et sed metus sollicitudin.”

experience.title: Full Stack Web Developer
experience.subtitle: TripleTen
experience.description_line_1: Developed and deployed responsive web applications using React and Node.js, focusing on clean code and optimized performance.
experience.description_line_2: Collaborated on end-to-end projects from API integration to frontend UI/UX implementation.

experience.title: Senior Video Editor
experience.subtitle: BAD Marketing (USA - remote)
experience.description_line_1: Optimized workflow processes, reducing review times by 15%.
experience.description_line_2: Managed project timelines and quality, delivering up to 2 days ahead of schedule.

experience.title: Motion Graphics Designer
experience.subtitle: TrueInsight (Canada - remote)
experience.description_line_1: Developed metric-driven content, achieving over 20,000 views per publication.
experience.description_line_2: Coordinated automotive and real-estate projects using agile methodologies.

serviceData.title: Web Development
serviceData.text: Specialized in creating dynamic web solutions using the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, and Node.js). Focused on writing clean, maintainable code and implementing responsive designs with Tailwind CSS and SCSS. My background in visual communication allows me to bridge the gap between complex backend logic and intuitive, high-impact user interfaces.

serviceData.title: Motion Graphics
serviceData.text: Expert in bringing brands to life through dynamic visual storytelling and high-end animation. Leveraging my background in Visual Communication, I specialize in creating engaging motion assets, promotional videos, and UI animations using After Effects and Premiere Pro. I focus on merging timing, typography, and rhythm to deliver compelling narratives that capture audience attention across all digital platforms.

serviceData.title: Video Editing
serviceData.text: Professional video editor with a focus on high-impact post-production for digital content and corporate projects. I combine technical precision in Premiere Pro and DaVinci Resolve with a deep understanding of visual rhythm and narrative flow. From color grading to sound design, I transform raw footage into polished, professional stories tailored for social media, marketing campaigns, and educational platforms.
